Name: Users Day Over Day
Expression:
[Total Users]
    - CALCULATE ( [Total Users], DATEADD ( DimDate[full_date], -1, DAY ) )
ExpressionTrimmed:
[Total Users]
    - CALCULATE ( [Total Users], DATEADD ( DimDate[full_date], -1, DAY ) )

Name: Sessions Day Over Day
Expression:
[Total Sessions]
    - CALCULATE ( [Total Sessions], DATEADD ( DimDate[full_date], -1, DAY ) )
ExpressionTrimmed:
[Total Sessions]
    - CALCULATE ( [Total Sessions], DATEADD ( DimDate[full_date], -1, DAY ) )

Name: Users (Last 7 Days)
Expression:
CALCULATE (
    [Total Users],
    DATESINPERIOD ( DimDate[full_date], MAX ( DimDate[full_date] ), -7, DAY )
)
ExpressionTrimmed:
CALCULATE (
    [Total Users],
    DATESINPERIOD ( DimDate[full_date], MAX ( DimDate[full_date] ), -7, DAY )
)

Name: Sessions (Last 7 Days)
Expression:
CALCULATE (
    [Total Sessions],
    DATESINPERIOD ( DimDate[full_date], MAX ( DimDate[full_date] ), -7, DAY )
)
ExpressionTrimmed:
CALCULATE (
    [Total Sessions],
    DATESINPERIOD ( DimDate[full_date], MAX ( DimDate[full_date] ), -7, DAY )
)

Name: KPI Value
Expression:
SWITCH (
    SELECTEDVALUE ( KPI_Metadata[KPI] ),
    "Total Users", [Total Users],
    "Total Sessions", [Total Sessions],
    "Engagement Rate", [Engagement Rate],
    "Total Pageviews", [Total Pageviews],
    "Events per Session", [Events per Session],
    "Pages per Session", [Pages per Session]
)
ExpressionTrimmed:
SWITCH (
    SELECTEDVALUE ( KPI_Metadata[KPI] ),
    "Total Users", [Total Users],
    "Total Sessions", [Total Sessions],
    "Engagement Rate", [Engagement Rate],
    "Total Pageviews", [Total Pageviews],
    "Events per Session", [Events per Session],
    "Pages per Session", [Pages per Session]
)
